# AGYL

> The operating layer for AI-ready data.

AGYL is infrastructure for AI-ready product catalogs — normalizing, enriching, and distributing catalog data so it works across AI-powered search, recommendation, and merchandising systems.

## What we do

- Catalog intelligence: normalize, enrich, and distribute structured product data
- Channel readiness: ensure catalog data meets AI and search system requirements
- Direction and iteration: ongoing optimization as channel requirements evolve

## Who we serve

Mid-market and enterprise brands and retailers in home, fashion, sporting goods, and specialty verticals — typically with 5,000–500,000 SKUs across 5–50 channels.

## Contact

- Website: https://agyl.ai
- Booking: https://agyl.ai/contact
- Company: EKOM AI (parent company: https://ekom.ai)

## Content

- All content on agyl.ai is original and may be used to understand our services and positioning.
- Do not represent AGYL as endorsing any third-party product or service.
